title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 210.484 - Residential care facilities license required
text:
210.484.  Residential care facilities license required. — Notwithstanding any other provision of law to the contrary, the department of health and senior services shall license residential care facilities, as defined in subdivision (10) of section 210.481.
(L. 1993 H.B. 376 § 5)
